visualization.name: JSON/YAML Viewer
visualization.description: Interactive viewer for JSON, YAML, and JSON-LD data
visualization.help:
# What is the JSON/YAML Viewer?
The JSON/YAML Viewer provides an interactive way to explore structured data files in JSON, YAML, or JSON-LD format directly in your browser.
After selecting a dataset, its contents will be displayed in a rich editor with multiple viewing modes.
## Key Features
- **Tree View**: Browse your data as an expandable tree with collapsible nodes, search, and path navigation. - **Text View**: Inspect the raw content with syntax highlighting powered by CodeMirror. - **Table View**: Visualize flat data structures in a tabular layout. - **Search & Filter**: Quickly find specific keys or values within large documents. - **YAML Support**: YAML files are automatically parsed and displayed in the viewer. - **JSON-LD Expansion**: Optionally expand compacted JSON-LD documents to inspect their full linked data structure. - **Dark Theme**: Automatically adapts to Galaxy's active theme.
This tool is useful for inspecting configuration files, API responses, metadata documents, and any structured data without leaving Galaxy.
To learn more about the underlying editor, visit: [https://github.com/josdejong/svelte-jsoneditor](https://github.com/josdejong/svelte-jsoneditor)
